description: Reuse of an Idempotency-Key with a different content_hash. Registry MUST return duplicate_publish (HTTP 409). The producer is reusing an idempotency key for new content — a programming error per RFC-ACDP-0003 §6.2.

input.notes: Different body content (e.g., a corrected title) re-signed with the same agent's key. The producer mistakenly reused idem-key-AAAA instead of generating a fresh key for the new publish.

registry_must_not: Overwrite the existing idempotency record with the new content_hash.
expected.rationale: The collision MUST be a hard error, not a silent overwrite. Producers that hit this code are signaling a key-reuse bug; a tolerant registry would mask the bug and create publication-level non-determinism.
